    18. Day 7: Are You About To Take Over The World?
</h2>

<div class="lecture-text-container">
<p></p><p>This will hardly be a day of rest. But you and your friend will feel relaxed knowing that you have found the purpose!</p><p>EXPLAIN THIS TO YOUR FRIEND:</p><p>"In this section we will break down your message in the steps it takes your audience from their their humdrum life to a more fulfilling life through your expression of it in your art.</p><p>"Let's separate your message into the steps of the journey towards achieve this transformation with you.</p><h2><strong>Step #1. The "Kids Are Not Alright" sub-message. Make your audience understand what you're fighting against. Communicate what is unacceptable about where things are at right now. This is where you focus on the status-quo.</strong></h2><p>Write down the key point(s) about how the world is now (in relation to your main message) that is not ok. STATUS QUO. List all your enemies here.</p><h2><strong>Step #2. The "We're Not Gonna Take It Anymore" sub-message. This is where you communicate what must be DONE to change things for the better. </strong></h2><p>Write down everything you see that can be done to change things. Write down concrete ACTIONS that can be taken.</p><h2><strong>Step #3. The "I Have a Dream" sub-message. You communicate how things could be. You paint a picture of the ideal future for your audience.</strong></h2><p>This is basically your message unfiltered. Add all the nuances and variations to color it. DREAM.</p><p><br class="softbreak" style="display: none;"></p><p>EXPLAIN THIS TO YOUR FRIEND: "Every time you communicate with your fans it will always be about one of these 3 sub-messages." In new wave marketing they're called Broadcast Messages."</p><p>"These are the ideas that will precede you every time you enter a room."</p><p>"It's what people will hear about you from others, sometimes way before they experience your actual art yet. You want that. It's called pre-framing. It's what will make your art more valuable."</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><p>GIVE YOUR FRIEND THESE EXAMPLES TO MAKE IT CLEAR:</p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1>Black Lives Matter Example</h1><p><strong>MAIN MESSAGE: INSTITUTIONALIZE RACISM EXISTS AND IT NEEDS TO END NOW.</strong></p><p>SUB-MESSAGE STATUS QUO: The police are killing us.</p><p>SUB-MESSAGE ACTION: Defund The Police</p><p>SUB-MESSAGE DREAM: We Police our own Neighborhoods.</p><p><em>Every time they communicate anywhere, you hear them focus on one of those 3 sub-messages. (They have several sub-messages for each step along the journey. This is just a simplified version.)</em></p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h1>Gary Vee Example</h1><p><strong>MAIN MESSAGE: YOU HAVE TO HUSTLE AND LOVE LOSING</strong></p><p>SUB-MESSAGE STATUS QUO: People are too impatient with trying to achieve success.</p><p>SUB-MESSAGE ACTION: Move back home. Let your ego take a hit.</p><p>SUB-MESSAGE DREAM: Legacy: Imagine a world where empathy is the main value in entrepreneurship (to reverse the current Steve Jobs "asshole ideal" that exists now)</p><p><em>Every time he communicates anywhere, you can hear him focus on one of these 3 sub-messages. (He too has more sub-messages than these. This is just a simplified version.)</em></p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><h2><strong>Write down what this movement looks like:</strong></h2><p>(THESE ARE ALL THE PLACES WHERE YOU WOULD SHARE YOUR BROADCAST MESSAGES)</p><p><strong>on IG</strong></p><p><strong>on Facebook</strong></p><p><strong>in a video form</strong></p><p><strong>as promotional materials, magazine shoots</strong></p><p><strong>as music</strong></p><p><strong>on stage / performance</strong></p><p><br class="softbreak"></p><p><em>Now go out there and make it real. </em></p><p></p>
